Custom Orders

Bring us your
strangest
little idea.

That cat with the crooked tail. The bouquet she didn't get to keep. The character only your best friend would recognise.
We make those.

  • Made slowly, just for you

    Every stitch is intentional.

  • We listen to every detail

    Share your idea, we'll guide the rest.

  • Wrapped with love

    Because the little things matter most.

You dream it, we'll crochet it.

Pick the size that feels just right.

Share inspiration (optional)

Not sure yet? That's okay.
Rough doodles, screenshots, childhood memories — anything helps.
We'll take it from there.

We'll never share your details. Ever.

@sunflora.craft

Lived-in, loved-in.

Follow on Instagram

The hands behind Sunflora

A studio of slow stitches, sunlit afternoons, and quiet rebellion against the disposable.

Sunflora began on a verandah, with one ball of mustard yarn and an idea that warmth could be something you hold. Each piece is hooked by hand — sometimes across days — never replicated by machine.

We are small on purpose. We choose soft cottons, we name each character, and we tuck a little note inside every package. Because the things that stay with you are rarely the ones made in a hurry.

3+ years of stitching
800+ happy homes

The asked things

Curious? Same.

How long does an order take?

Most ready-made pieces ship within 3–5 days. Custom orders take 5–14 days depending on complexity — we'll always share a timeline before we start.

Do you ship internationally?

Yes — we ship worldwide. International orders are sent via tracked mail and usually arrive within 7–14 working days.

Can I order a piece in custom colours?

Absolutely. Send us a reference, and we'll match colours from our cotton library. You'll get a swatch photo for approval before we begin.

How do I care for my crochet piece?

Gently spot clean with mild soap and cold water. Air dry flat, away from direct sun. Each package comes with a care card.

Are returns possible?

Because each piece is handmade, we don't accept returns — but if something is genuinely wrong, write to us and we'll make it right.

One last thing

Let's craft
your story.

Whether it's a gift, a heirloom, or simply something to keep on your desk — we'd love to make it for you. Slide into our DMs or send us a hello.

WhatsApp us @sunflora.craft
Sunflora.

A tiny crochet studio. Made slowly, sent with love, signed by hand.
